section.heading: General provisions relating to bonds

content.p: The provisions of section 5551 (relating to bonds) shall be applicable to the bonds required under section 5354.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 85–859, title II, § 201, Sept. 2, 1958, 72 Stat. 1379.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 5355, act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 736, 68A Stat. 664, consisted of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by Pub. L. 85–859.
